title: OPBREAK
description: Advanced Item Management: Anti-Tool-Break, Anti-Armor-Break, Anti-Drop, Anti-Interact, Stats-Tracking, HUD Display and Inventory Full Warning customizable via GUI.
body:
# 🛡️ OPBREAK – Advanced Item Management 🛡️
**Smart Protection • Zero Breakage • Full Control**

**Version:** v1.1.0-beta  
**Loader:** Fabric  
**Languages:** German / English

---

## 📜 What is OPBREAK?

**OPBREAK** is an All-in-One Fabric **Protection Mod** with an **Advanced Item Management**.

**Current Features:**
- Anti-Tool-Break
- Anti-Armor-Break
- Anti-Drop
- Anti-Interact
- Stats Tracking
- HUD Display
- Inventory Full Warning

---

## ✨ Anti-Tool-Break & Anti-Armor-Break ✨

![Anti-Tool-Break & Anti-Armor-Break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bdzb5h4i/images/7e29d3b0180db43b82483b8098da53f04ca01e82.png)

---

## 💧 Anti-Drop 💧

![Anti-Drop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bdzb5h4i/images/3878bcf50f6d82069d002d62db33de90d193f004.png)

---

## 🚫 Anti-Interact 🚫

![Anti-Interact](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bdzb5h4i/images/c84949e7871b9d3453779a1038a03b702a47f47f.png)

---

## 📊 Stats Tracking 📊

![Stats Tracking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bdzb5h4i/images/4b0db9c74fb2647e8d19a6bc6a37cf98a55713fe.png)

**Tracked Statistics:**
- First Seen
- Last Warning
- Uses
- Prevented Uses
- Warnings
- Broken
- Drops
- Prevented Drops

---

## 📱 HUD Display 📱

![HUD Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bdzb5h4i/images/c67d0c7db15f679f9e4dc80e5530904ae51351da_350.webp) ![Widget Editor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bdzb5h4i/images/c8646a8553025c9967e89aed9c957999ac9bf98f_350.webp)

![Inventory Full Warning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bdzb5h4i/images/e71e6e27c72197d6730d6a8d5252210445fb88ff_350.webp)

## ⚙️ Settings ⚙️

![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Bdzb5h4i/images/2cbe82f33ab027a655794565eacd3173fd5878a9.png)

Configure every feature and setting instantly, no commands, no config files.
Changes apply immediately in-game.

---
